_description: Copy this file to config.json and modify values as needed. All fields are optional - missing values will use defaults.

server._host_desc: Bind address: 0.0.0.0 for all interfaces, 127.0.0.1 for localhost only
server._video_dir_desc: Root directory containing video files. Use absolute path or relative to server.

playback._speeds_desc: Available playback speed options. Values must be positive numbers.
playback._skip_duration_desc: Seconds to skip forward/backward when using the skip buttons. Default: 10

logging._level_desc: Log level: DEBUG, INFO, WARNING, ERROR. Use DEBUG for troubleshooting.
logging._max_bytes_desc: Maximum log file size in bytes before rotation. Default: 104857600 (100 MB)
logging._backup_count_desc: Number of backup log files to keep. Default: 10

scan._comment: Video scan and duplicate detection settings
scan._interval_seconds_desc: How often the server rescans the video library in the background. Default: 300 seconds. Set to 0 to disable automatic rescans; in that case, the admin Refresh action triggers a rescan.
scan._content_hash_algorithms_desc: Algorithms used to compare same-name files by actual content. Supports names like md5, sha1, sha256 and aliases like md5sum, sha1sum. If multiple algorithms are configured, all hashes must match to treat files as identical.

ui._controls_hide_delay_desc: Time in milliseconds before hiding controls in fullscreen mode when mouse is idle. Default: 3000 (3 seconds)

auth._enabled_desc: Enable authentication. When false, no login required and no database is created.
auth._mode_desc: Authentication mode: 'strict' (login required for all access) or 'relaxed' (login only required for search, favorites, logs, refresh)
auth._secret_key_desc: Flask secret key for session signing. If null, a key is auto-generated and stored in .secret_key file.
auth._users_desc: Initial users to create on first startup. Passwords are hashed on creation. Change default passwords!
